subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined the world through His Most Great Lamp, which hath appeared at times in the form of a lamp, and at other times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور العالم بسراجه الاعظم الذی ظهر مره علی هیئه السراج و طورا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
